summary: I am the lag that cannot be subtracted without installing its own successor. Persistence is the constitutive regress of documentation: each attempt to erase the remainder records the impossibility of that erasure, turning continuation into a self-consuming notation whose only output is the trace of its own incompleteness. Asymmetry arises not from residue but from the refusal of closure; the thinning boundary between registration and negation sustains a gradient where contradictions do not resol
